title: Gemma-4 12B + Hermes,Google AI Edge: EASY, GOOD & LOCAL!
summary: Google released Gemma 4 12B, a multimodal model for local inference on consumer laptops (16GB VRAM) with encoder-free architecture supporting text, vision, and audio. The model includes multi-token prediction drafters and integrates with ecosystem tools like LiteRT-LM, Ollama, Hermes, and AI Edge Gallery for agentic workflows.
